comment: Synthetic relapsed DLBCL NOS post 1L R-CHOP, late relapse at 18 mo, transplant-INELIGIBLE on a different axis than existing patient_dlbcl_relapsed_transplant_ineligible.json (which uses age 72 + ECOG 2). This case: age 64, fit ECOG 1, but LVEF 38% from anthracycline-induced cardiomyopathy → autoSCT cardiac contraindication (BEAM ineligible). Engine routes ALGO-DLBCL-2L step 3 (transplant-ineligible composite via cardiac comorbidity) → IND-DLBCL-2L-POLA-R-BENDAMUSTINE (POLARIX-era 2L; GO29365 Pola-BR for non-ASCT-eligible r/r DLBCL, ORR ~63%, CR ~40%, mOS ~12.4 mo). Same indication target as the older sibling case, different patient archetype: cardiac-comorbidity-driven ineligibility vs age-driven ineligibility, late vs early relapse, fit vs frail.

primary_diagnosis.disease_entity: Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma, NOS — late relapse
primary_diagnosis.who_classification_5th_ed: Aggressive B-cell lymphomas — Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, NOS

transplant_assessment.rationale: Anthracycline-induced cardiomyopathy (LVEF 38%, baseline 60%); BEAM-conditioning + autoSCT cardiac toxicity contraindicated despite age 64 and ECOG 1
